overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a player walking through a foggy, stormy wilderness at dusk. The player holds a rifle while navigating grassy terrain as lightning strikes illuminate the distant hills and scattered pine trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy open field with scattered pine trees

events.description: Bright lightning bolt strikes in the distance, briefly illuminating the storm clouds and foggy landscape

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the foggy wilderness holding a rifle, scanning the stormy horizon

entered.detail: Dark silhouetted evergreen trees against the stormy sky
Large rocky outcrop rising above the grassy terrain
Dark turbulent storm clouds covering the sky
Long gun held in right hand, visible in lower right corner of frame

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a desolate foggy field at dusk, holding a rifle. Tall pine trees stand silhouetted on the right while rocky hills rise in the distance. The sky is dominated by dark storm clouds. At 41 seconds, a bright lightning bolt strikes, momentarily illuminating the landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching rural settlement with wooden fences

agents.ego_description: continuing forward toward distant buildings silhouetted against the dark horizon

entered.detail: Dark silhouettes of structures or ruins on the horizon
Weathered wooden fence posts running along the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: After the lightning strike, the player continues walking through the grassy terrain as the landscape reveals distant abandoned buildings on the horizon. A weathered wooden fence appears on the left side while the pine trees grow closer on the right. The stormy sky remains overhead as the player approaches the settlement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective through a desolate, storm-swept wilderness that gradually reveals the outskirts of a forgotten settlement. It begins with the player navigating a foggy field at dusk, holding a rifle while silhouetted pine trees and rocky hills loom under a canopy of dark storm clouds. As a sudden, bright bolt of lightning strikes, the flash momentarily illuminates the landscape before the camera continues forward through the grassy terrain. The scene then shifts as the environment opens up, bringing a weathered wooden fence into view on the left and drawing the pine trees closer on the right. Finally, the movement leads toward the horizon where abandoned buildings emerge from the gloom under the persisting storm.
